title: Opening for Store Manager at Durian Furniture South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Durian Furniture South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Durian Furniture South Asia Partners:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture South Asia Partners!
